UnitAbilities.Title: Praesidium Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vexilla
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Stand Vigil
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentinel Storm
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can shoot again.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vexilla
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Resolute Will
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Character is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Living Fortress
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vexilla
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Slayers of Tyrants
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Character, Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: From Golden Light
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponenet’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Turbo-boost
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Quicksilver Execution
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daughters of the Abyss
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Purity of Execution
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Psyker unit, that attack has the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daughters of the Abyss
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Deft Parry
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daughters of the Abyss
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sanctified Flames
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Praesidium shield
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of the Stances
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when this model's unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, unitl that fight is resolved, both Ka'tah Stances are active for that unit, instead of only one.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strategic Mastery
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, you can select one model from your army with this ability. That model’s unit can be targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP

UnitNames: CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS

UnitAbilities.Title: Swift Onslaught
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Martial Inspiration
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Charge phase this model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitNames: CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Perception
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tenacious Spirit
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daughter of the Abyss
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daughters of the Abyss
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Self Repair
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of 12 Anathema Psykana 
Infantry models.

Options: master-crafted boltgun and close combat weapon
Witchseeker flamer and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Seeker’s Instincts
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daughter of the Abyss
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Corner the Quarry
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) that is within Engagement Range of this model’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

UnitAbilities.Title: Auramite and Adamantine
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strategic Mastery
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, you can select one model from your army with this ability and target that model’s unit with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sweeping Advance
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if this model's unit has fought this phase, if this model’s unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move or, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strategic Mastery
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, you can select one model from your army with this ability and target that model’s unit with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Captain-General
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic skill or Weapon skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Moment Shackle
UnitAbilities.Text:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase:
	▪ This model’s Watcher’s Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12.
	▪ This model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

UnitNames: CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

UnitAbilities.Title: Golden Laurels
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hero of Lion’s Gate
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

UnitNames: CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS

UnitAbilities.Title: Unyielding Ancient
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Custodes Infantry models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: No Foe Shall Stand
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

Infos.Title: CUSTODIAN GUARD
Infos.Text:
If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be 
attached to a Custodian Guard unit, it can be attached to 
this unit instead.

Keywords: Custodian Guard with Adrasite and Pyrithite Spears

UnitAbilities.Title: Saturation Volleys
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Disintegration Beams
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Infos.Title: CUSTODIAN GUARD
Infos.Text:
If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be 
attached to a Custodian Guard unit, it can be attached to 
this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Assault Infantry
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: From Golden Light
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Infos.Title: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR
Infos.Text:
If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be 
attached to an Allarus Custodians unit, it can be attached 
to this unit instead.

Options: lastrum storm bolter and infernus incinerator
lastrum storm bolter and twin adrathic destructor
infernus incinerator and twin adrathic destructor

UnitAbilities.Title: Dread Foe
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Turbo-boost
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Implacable Vanguard
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

Infos.Title: JETBIKE OUTRIDERS
Infos.Text:
If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be 
attached to a Vertus Praetors unit, it can be attached to this 
unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tarsus Buckler
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strike from the Skies
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Swooping Dive
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

Infos.Title: JUMP PACKS
Infos.Text: This unit cannot embark within a Venerable Land Raider.

UnitAbilities.Title: Merciless Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

iliastus accelerator culverin and arachnus storm cannon

arachnus storm cannon, Telemon caestus and twin plasma projector

UnitAbilities.Title: Guardian Eternal
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Devoted to Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is equipped with 2 Telemon caestus weapons in addition to its armoured feet weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those Telemon caestus weapons.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Advanced Firepower
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time this model makes an attack with its twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon that targets an enemy Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of 8 Adeptus Custodes 
Infantry models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Dropship
UnitAbilities.Text: If a unit disembarks from this Transport before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Custodes 
Infantry models. This model can also transport 1 Venerable 
Contemptor Dreadnought, 1 Contemptor-Achillus 
Dreadnought or 1 Contemptor Galatus-Dreadnought; 
while doing so, its transport capacity is reduced to 6 Adeptus 
Custodes Infantry models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Infernus Firebombs
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Galatus Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a melee attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the ARMOURY tag and cannot be taken with another ARMOURY detachment.
Rule.Title: MARCH OF THE HONOURED DEAD
Rule.Text:
Friendly Adeptus Custodes Walker units:
▪ Have +2" M.
▪ Have +1 to advance rolls and charge rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Flawless Construction
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Adeptus Custodes Walker unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Walker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Unstoppable Advance
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Adeptus Custodes Walker unit is selected to move.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Walker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Mobile.

Stratagems.Name: Prioritised Eradication
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Telemon Heavy Dreadnought unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Telemon Heavy Dreadnought unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
Your unit’s:
▪ Arachnus Storm Cannon weapons have [RAPID FIRE 6].
▪ Iliastus Accelerator Culverin weapons have [RAPID FIRE 2].

Enhancements.Name: Interred Expertise
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Custodes Walker unit only. This unit’s attacks can:
▪ Re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
▪ Re‑roll wound rolls of 1.

Enhancements.Name: Auramite Sarcophagus
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes Walker unit only. When you target this unit with the Crushing Impact stratagem, that use is ‑1 CP.

AddedAbilities.Title: March of the Honoured Dead
AddedAbilities.Text: This unit has +1 to advance rolls and charge rolls.

Rule.Title: SKIN-CRAWLING DISORIENTATION
Rule.Text:
When a friendly Anathema Psykana unit is selected to make an advance move, that advance move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.

Friendly Anathema Psykana units have the following ability:
Ceaseless Vigilance: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is nulled:
	▪ While a unit is nulled, that unit has +3" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Deathsong Scythes
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when a friendly Vigilators unit is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Vigilators unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
▪ Your unit’s melee attacks have [LANCE].
▪ Your unit’s melee attacks that target a Psyker unit have +1 A.

Stratagems.Name: Umbral Prosecution
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Prosecutors unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Prosecutors unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
Your unit’s Boltgun weapons have:
▪ [RAPID FIRE 2].
▪ +1 AP.

Stratagems.Name: Synchronised Inferno
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Witchseekers unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Witchseekers unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s [TORRENT] ranged attacks have [BLAST 1].

Enhancements.Name: Encircling Hunter
Enhancements.Description: Anathema Psykana model only. When both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy up to three friendly Anathema Psykana Infantry units. When doing so, you can set those units up in strategic reserves, regardless of how many units are already in strategic reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Psyk-out Grenades
Enhancements.Description:
Anathema Psykana unit only.
▪ This unit has Explosives.
▪ When you target this unit with the Explosives stratagem, if you select an enemy Psyker unit, you can re‑roll rolls to determine whether that enemy unit suffers a mortal wound.

AddedAbilities.Title: Ceaseless Vigilance
AddedAbilities.Text:
In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is nulled:
	▪ While a unit is nulled, that unit has +3" detection range.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the LIONS tag and cannot be taken with another LIONS detachment.
Rule.Title: THE HAMMER FALLS
Rule.Text: If a friendly Adeptus Custodes Terminator unit made an ingress move this turn, that unit can re‑roll charge rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Hardened Resolve
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Adeptus Custodes Terminator unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Terminator unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has +1 T.

Stratagems.Name: Unleash the Lions
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Allarus Custodians/Aquilon Custodians unit that is on the battlefield.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a starting strength of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Electroexorcist Saturation
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Adeptus Custodes Terminator unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Terminator unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s Ballistus Grenade Launcher weapons have D3+3 A.

Enhancements.Name: Mnemo-locked Shrine Cipher
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes Terminator model only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.

Enhancements.Name: Efficient Aggression
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes Terminator model only. (Once per turn, per army) In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this unit lost a wound as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".

Rule.Title: Martial Mastery
Rule.Text:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the bullet points below. If you do, until the start of the next battle round, that bullet point’s effects apply.

	▪ Each time an Adeptus Custodes model from your army with the Martial Ka'tah ability makes a melee attack, a succesful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

	▪ Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by Adeptus Custodes models from your army with the Martial Ka'tah ability by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Arcane Genetic Alchemy
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a mortal wound has been allocated to an Adeptus Custodes model from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana models).
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes model's unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Avenge The Fallen
Stratagems.When: Start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) that is below its Starting Strength.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is Below Half-strength, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those melee weapons instead.

Stratagems.Name: Unwavering Sentinels
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Infantry unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) that is within range of an objective marker you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Multipotentiality
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that Fell Back this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of your turn, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Vigilance Eternal
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Battleline unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

Stratagems.Name: Archeotech Munitions
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

Enhancements.Name: From The Hall of Armouries
Enhancements.Description: Shield-Captain model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

Enhancements.Name: Castellan's Mark
Enhancements.Description: Shield-Captain model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army (excluding Anathema Psykana units) and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Auric Mantle
Enhancements.Description: Shield-Captain or Blade Champion model only. Add 2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

Enhancements.Name: Panoptispex
Enhancements.Description: Shield-Captain or Blade Champion model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Rule.Title: REVERED COMPANIONS
Rule.Text:
Anathema Psykana units from your army gain the following ability:

Null Aegis (Aura): While an Adeptus Custodes unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

All other Adeptus Custodes unit from your army gain the following ability:

Deadly Unity (Aura): While an Anathema Psykana unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that Anathema Psykana unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Hunt as One
Stratagems.Category: TALONS OF THE EMPEROR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your units are eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an Anathema Psykana unit and both are within 6" of each other.

Stratagems.Name: Talons Interlocked
Stratagems.Category: TALONS OF THE EMPEROR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army, and one enemy unit that is an eligible target for all of those units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in one of your units makes a ranged attack, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can ony select two units if one (and only one) of them is an Anathema Psykana unit and both are within 6" of each other.

Stratagems.Name: Enpyric Serverance
Stratagems.Category: TALONS OF THE EMPEROR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enmy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit#s attacks, and one friendly Anathema Psykana unit within 6" of that Adeptus Custodes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic attacks and mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Emperor's Executioners
Stratagems.Category: TALONS OF THE EMPEROR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes units from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of your units targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an Anathema Psykana unit and both are within 6" of each other.

Stratagems.Name: Taloned Pincer
Stratagems.Category: TALONS OF THE EMPEROR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Adeptus Custodes unit that is within 8" of one or more friendly Anathema Psykana units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your units can make a Normal move of up to 6".
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select units that are within Engagtement Range of one or more enemy units. You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an Anathema Psykana unit and both are within 6" of each other.

Stratagems.Name: Shield of Honour
Stratagems.Category: TALONS OF THE EMPEROR - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Anathema Psykana Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attack, and one other friendly Adeptus Custodes Infantry unit (excluding Anathema Psykana units) within 6" of that Anathema Psykana Infantry unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, any attack that targets your Anathema Psykana unit must instead target your other Adeptus Custodes unit (unless it is not an eligible target).

Enhancements.Name: Radiant Mantle
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Gift of Terran Artifice
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Champion of the Imperium
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. The range of the bearer’s Null Aegis or Deadly Unity ability (see left) is increased to 9".

Enhancements.Name: Aegis Projector
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

AddedAbilities.Title: Null Aegis (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While an Adeptus Custodes unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

AddedAbilities.Title: Deadly Unity (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While an Anathema Psykana unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that Anathema Psykana unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: CREEPING DREAD (AURA)
Rule.Text:
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is either a Psyker unit or below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more Anathema Psykana models from your army, that enemy unit must take  a Battle-shock test. If that unit is Below Half-strength, it must subtract 1 from its Battle-shock test this phase instead.

Designer’s Note: This means that all enemy Psyker units within range of this Aura ability and all enemy units within range of this Aura ability that have lost one or more models must take a Battle-shock test in your opponents Command phase, not just those that are Below Half-strength.

KEYWORDS: If you select this Detachment, Prosecutors units from your army have the Battleline keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Desperation's Price
Stratagems.Category: NULL MAIDEN VIGIL - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy Psyker unit has either finished using a Psychic ability that targets a unit, or finished making Psychic Attacks.
Stratagems.Target: One Anathema Psykana unit from your army within 18" of that enemy Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That enemy Psyker unit must take a Leadership test. If the test is passed, that Psyker unit is Battle-shocked; if the test is failed that Psyker unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and is Battle-shocked.

Stratagems.Name: Witch Hunters
Stratagems.Category: NULL MAIDEN VIGIL - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shoot phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Anathema Psykana unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability, but models in your unit can only target Psyker units with their attacks.

Stratagems.Name: Anathema Blademastery
Stratagems.Category: NULL MAIDEN VIGIL - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Vigilators unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If the target of that attack is Battle-shocked or a Psyker, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Psy-chaff Volley
Stratagems.Category: NULL MAIDEN VIGIL - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Prosecutors unit from your army that has just shot.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while your unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is prosecuted. While a unit is prosecuted, each time an Anathema Psykana model makes an attack against that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. While a Psyker or Battle-shocked unit is prosecuted, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Purgation Sweep
Stratagems.Category: NULL MAIDEN VIGIL - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Witchseekers unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit. If such a weapon targets a Psyker or Battle-shocked unit this phase, add 2 to its Attacks characteristic instead.

Stratagems.Name: Psychic Abominations
Stratagems.Category: NULL MAIDEN VIGIL - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Anathema Psykana Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attack.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and Battle-shocked and Psyker models can only select your unit as the target of a ranged attack if they are within 12".

Enhancements.Name: Raptor Blade
Enhancements.Description: Anathema Psykana model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy Psyker units that are Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Enhancements.Name: Enhanced Voidsheen Cloak
Enhancements.Description: Anathema Psykana model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made by a Psyker or Battle-shocked model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

Enhancements.Name: Huntress' Eye
Enhancements.Description: Anathema Psykana model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Oblivion Knight
Enhancements.Description: Anathema Psykana model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targeted an enemy Psyker unit, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Rule.Title: ASSEMBLAGE OF MIGHT
Rule.Text: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in an Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Slayer of Champions
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army that has just destroyed the unit you selected at the start of your Command phase as the target of your Assemblage of Might ability.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll. In addition, if the destroyed unit was a Character unit, gain 1CP.

Stratagems.Name: Superhuman Reserves
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a Adeptus Custodes Warlord model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet or from an Enhancement that says it can only be used 'Once per battle'.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Warlord model.
Stratagems.Effect: Your model can use its 'Once per battle' ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase).
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: The Emperor's Auspice
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enmy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, Character models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: Earning of a Name
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Adeptus Custodes Character units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a Character model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Vigil Unending
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army that was just destroyed and has not fought this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Shoulder the Mantle
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army that is not leading a unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one friendly unit (excluding Battle-shocked and Attached units) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your model that it could lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your model attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

Enhancements.Name: Blade Imperator
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, all enemy units within 6" of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Inspirational Exemplar
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 5+. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Custodes unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer; that unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

Enhancements.Name: Veiled Blade
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, triple the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic until the end of the turn.

Enhancements.Name: Martial Philosopher
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Once per battle, in your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of the bearer, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

Rule.Title: AURIC ARMOUR
Rule.Text:
▪ While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is at Starting Strength, unless that unit is an Aircraft or it is Battle‑shocked, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
▪ While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is below Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
▪ While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is Below Half‑strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

MORITOI ANCIENTS
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in Adeptus Custodes Walker units from your army and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for such units. 

KEYWORDS
In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to 2 Adeptus Custodes Walker models from your army. The selected units gain the Character keyword.

Designer’s Note: This means that the selected models can be given Enhancements and one of them can be selected as your Warlord.

Stratagems.Name: Flawless Construction
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Emperor’s Vengeance
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit has the Walker keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is assumed to have 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Wrathful Advance
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just before an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army Piles In.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3".

Stratagems.Name: Unstoppable
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes Vehicle or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

Stratagems.Name: Relentless Persecution
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army Advances.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the Walker keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

Stratagems.Name: Punishment Inescapable
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Adamantine Talisman
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Augury Uplink
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Honoured Fallen (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes Vehicle model only. While a friendly Adeptus Custodes Infantry or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

Enhancements.Name: Veteran of The Kataphraktoi
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes Infantry or Adeptus Custodes Mounted model only. In your Command phase, select one Adeptus Custodes Vehicle or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Rule.Title: AGAINST ALL ODDS
Rule.Text: Each time a model in an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding Vehicles) makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Gilded Champion
Stratagems.Category: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet that states it can only be used ‘once per battle’.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes Character model.
Stratagems.Effect: Your model can use that ‘once per battle’ ability one additional time during the battle (but not in the same phase).
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem on the same Adeptus Custodes Character model more than once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: Defiant to The Last
Stratagems.Category: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the Character keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Peerless Warrior
Stratagems.Category: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Unleash The Lions
Stratagems.Category: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Allarus Custodians or Aquilon Custodians unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
Stratagems.Effect: That unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a Starting Strength of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Manoeuvre and Fire
Stratagems.Category: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Custodes unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Swift As The Eagle
Stratagems.Category: LIONS OF THE EMPEROR - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding Vehicle units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Enhancements.Name: Superior Creation
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes Infantry model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

Enhancements.Name: Praesidius
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Fierce Conqueror
Enhancements.Description: Shield-Captain model only. At the start of the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer for every 5 enemy models within 6" of the bearer (rounding down).

Enhancements.Name: Admonimortis
Enhancements.Description: Shield-Captain model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

ArmyRules.Title: MARTIAL KA’TAH
ArmyRules.Text:
Each time a unit from your army with this ability is selected to fight, select one of the Ka’tah Stances below. Until that unit has finished making its attacks, the selected Stance is active for it and it gains the relevant ability:

Dacatari Stance
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
Rendax Stance
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
